title: Verify Settings > Language menu is accessible
steps: Locate the Language option in the Settings menu
expected: The Language option is visible and tappable in the Settings screen.

title: Verify selecting Spanish language displays Spanish text on welcome screen
steps: Confirm the language change if prompted
expected: The welcome screen displays text in Spanish (e.g., 'Bienvenido' or equivalent Spanish greeting), not Portuguese.

title: Verify selecting Portuguese language displays Portuguese text on welcome screen
steps: Confirm the language change if prompted
expected: The welcome screen displays text in Portuguese (e.g., 'Bem-vindo' or equivalent Portuguese greeting).

title: Verify switching from Spanish to English reverts welcome screen to English
steps: Return to welcome screen and verify Spanish text is shown
Confirm the language change if prompted
expected: The welcome screen displays text in English after switching back from Spanish.

title: Verify Spanish and Portuguese welcome texts are distinct and not mixed
steps: Return to welcome screen and capture the welcome text
Return to welcome screen and capture the welcome text
expected: The Spanish welcome text (e.g., 'Bienvenido') is different from the Portuguese welcome text (e.g., 'Bem-vindo'). No mixing or overlap of languages occurs.

title: Verify all UI strings on welcome screen are in Spanish when Spanish is selected
steps: Inspect all visible text labels, buttons, and headings on the screen
expected: All UI elements on the welcome screen display text in Spanish. No English or Portuguese strings are visible.

title: Verify language selection persists after app restart
steps: Return to welcome screen and verify Spanish text is shown
expected: The welcome screen still displays text in Spanish after the app is restarted, confirming the language preference is persisted.

title: Verify default language is English on first launch
steps: Clear app data or install the application fresh
Launch the application for the first time
expected: The welcome screen displays text in English by default before any language selection is made.
